publishedAbstract: - `NonRoot` container cannot write/create folders to an `ocs-storagecluster-cephfs` mounted volume on a Red Hat Openshift Data Foundation (RHODF) 4.12 cluster as the permission is set to 755. ~~~ drwxr-xr-x. 5 root root 61 Feb 23 20:55 shared_folder ~~~- Whereas it works fine in 4.11 cluster as it gets mounted with global permission 777. ~~~ drwxrwxrwx. 9 root root 7 Feb 23 09:00 shared_folder ~~~- How can pods in the same project (namespace) access folders on a shared an `ocs-storagecluster-cephfs` `PVC`?
publishedTitle: Unable to write to new cephfs shared volume by `NonRoot` container in ODF 4.12
